advisory.label: Advisory Services
advisory.card_body: We observe your practice onsite, build a tailored evaluation and framework, document your processes, and guide you through technology transformation.

services.name: Practice Observation
services.nav_desc: On-site assessment of workflows and patient touchpoints
services.card_desc: On-site assessment of your workflows, staff interactions, and patient touchpoints.

services.name: Front Desk Framework
services.card_desc: Structured evaluation of front desk performance across key operational metrics.

services.name: Operational SOP Definition
services.card_desc: Documented, standardized processes that reduce errors and survive staff turnover.

services.name: Tech Transformation
services.nav_desc: Identifying and implementing the right technology
services.card_desc: Identifying and implementing the right technology to automate and scale your operations.

ai.label: Sage AI Agents
ai.card_body: Intelligent agents and analytics that automate operational workflows across the patient journey. Fully managed. Works with your existing EHR and phone system.
